text-block-1.title: Adaptive Configuration Framework
text-block-1.text:
Context-Aware Configuration (CAConfig) allows different parts of your content tree to have different configurations. Like how different regions of the Matrix can have different rules of physics, CAConfig lets different content paths have different settings.

Configurations are inherited down the content tree and can be overridden at any level, providing flexible, context-specific settings.

code-block-1.title: Context-Aware Configuration

text-block-2.title: CAConfig Benefits
text-block-2.text:
• Context-specific configurations per content tree
  • Configuration inheritance with override capability
  • Type-safe configuration using Java annotations
  • Support for simple properties and nested configurations
  • Built-in editor UI for authors
  • Multi-tenancy support for different sites
